name: heer-boaz-coding-bible
description: Project-agnostic coding and architecture doctrine for direct, low-waste implementation, cleanup, analysis, and formatting work.

interface.shortDescription: Strict coding, architecture, analysis, and formatting doctrine.
interface.longDescription: A project-agnostic set of Codex skills for implementing features, removing architecture debt, running quality analysis, and fixing formatting without adding defensive clutter, legacy fallbacks, suppressions, or ownership-hiding layers.
defaultPrompt: Use the coding bible to implement this feature cleanly.
Use the coding bible to remove this architecture debt.
Use the coding bible to run quality analysis and fix real issues.
